L

LexicalCommandProcessor - Class in cli
Acts as a lexical pre-processor that transforms raw, fragmented command-line arguments into a sequence of cohesive, logical tokens.
LexicalCommandProcessor(String[]) - Constructor for class cli.LexicalCommandProcessor
Constructs a new instance designed to sanitise and normalise the specified command line arguments.
longFlag - Variable in class cli.FlagRule
 
LongFlagHandler - Class in cli
Provides a concrete strategy for processing long-form flags based on GNU conventions.
LongFlagHandler() - Constructor for class cli.LongFlagHandler
 
longHandler - Variable in class cli.CommandFlagParser
